mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.prvc_prcs_proc_log ( acs_dt, acs_user_oid, acs_id, acs_ip, menu_nm, flfmt_task_dtl, info_prcs_subj, rsn, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( IFNULL(#{acsDt}, NOW()), #{acsuserOid}, #{acsId}, #{acsIp}, #{menuNm}, #{flfmtTaskDtl}, #{infoPrcsSubj}, #{rsn}, IFNULL(#{regId}, 'SYSTEM'), IFNULL(#{regDt}, NOW()) )
